Interface IRasterTypeDataSourceHandlerParameters3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters to raster type data source handler.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4BF06473-9ABB-4B1F-8656-30950277279F")]
public interface IRasterTypeDataSourceHandlerParameters3 : IRasterTypeDataSourceHandlerParameters2, IRasterTypeDataSourceHandlerParameters

Properties

ActiveTemplate

The name of the active item template associated with the raster type used for building the specified data source. A raster type that doesn't contain the matching template is not considered candidate. All other templates are disabled when building the data sour

string ActiveTemplate { get; set; }

Property Value

string
